hero.title: Sell Online for Free, Keep 100% of Your Profits
hero.subtitle: SouqFlow gives you a professional digital storefront with zero commission. Start selling in minutes, not days.

features.title: Why Choose SouqFlow?
features.subtitle: Everything you need to run your online business, included for free

zeroCommission.title: Zero Commission
zeroCommission.description: Keep 100% of your profits. We only charge 2 LE per fulfilled order to keep the platform running.

easySetup.title: 10-Minute Setup
easySetup.description: Create your store, add products, and start selling in under 10 minutes. No technical skills required.

whatsapp.title: WhatsApp Integration
whatsapp.description: Get instant notifications when customers order. Communicate directly with buyers via WhatsApp.

unlimited.title: Unlimited Products
unlimited.description: Add as many products as you want. No limits on inventory, categories, or images.

analytics.title: Built-in Analytics
analytics.description: Track your sales, revenue, and customer behavior with real-time analytics dashboard.

arabicFirst.title: Arabic-First Design
arabicFirst.description: Fully designed for Arabic speakers with RTL support and Egyptian payment methods.

pricing.title: Simple, Transparent Pricing
pricing.subtitle: No hidden fees. No monthly subscriptions. Just 2 LE per successful order.

free.title: Free Forever
free.description: Everything you need to start selling

cta.title: Ready to Start Selling?
cta.subtitle: Join hundreds of sellers already using SouqFlow to grow their business.

aboutUs.title: About Us
aboutUs.subtitle: Empowering Egyptian Sellers
aboutUs.description: SouqFlow is built on the belief that running an online business should be free of prohibitive commission fees. We provide the tools you need to succeed.

community.title: Community First
community.desc: Built for Egyptian merchants, understanding local needs.

innovation.title: Continuous Innovation
innovation.desc: We constantly update our platform with cutting-edge tools.

trust.title: Secure & Reliable
trust.desc: Your data and your customers' data is safe with us.

footer.tagline: The zero-commission platform for Egyptian sellers
